metadata.name: Contoso Retail Operations
metadata.description: Complete operational intelligence for store managers and regional directors. Provides real-time visibility into daily sales, store performance, supply chain status, and customer behavior across all Contoso retail locations.

landing_page.description: Executive Dashboard is the default landing page when users open the app.

audience.description: Store Managers, Regional Directors, VP Operations, and operational analysts who need daily visibility into retail performance.

auto_install.description: App is automatically installed for all members of the target security groups. Users see it in their Power BI Apps list without manual installation.

update_policy.description: Users always see the latest published version. When the app is republished, all users get the updated content immediately without needing to reinstall.

sections.name: Daily Operations
sections.description: Day-to-day sales performance and store operations.

items.description: High-level KPIs: revenue, growth, order value, and customer count with regional breakdowns and trend analysis.
Deep-dive into sales by product category, channel, payment method, and time period. Includes cohort analysis and trend detection.

sections.name: Supply Chain
sections.description: Supply chain visibility and logistics tracking.

items.description: Inventory levels, reorder alerts, supplier performance, and shipment tracking across all distribution channels.
KPI scorecard tracking on-time delivery, fill rate, supplier quality, and logistics cost per unit.

sections.name: Customer Intelligence
sections.description: Customer behavior, segmentation, and loyalty insights.

items.description: Customer segmentation, loyalty tier analysis, lifetime value distribution, and geographic heatmaps.

row_level_security.description: Store Managers see only their assigned store's data. Regional Directors see data for their region. VP Operations sees all data.
